svg.title: MPP project overall architecture
svg.desc: Overall architecture for multi-platform-poster, showing the Next.js frontend, Go backend, FastAPI AI service, browser worker, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker runtime, and publishing platform integrations with real SVG technology icons.
svg.text: Next.js workspace for creation and prepublish; Go backend handles auth, projects, queues, and remote browser sessions.
FastAPI AI Service streams content and prepublish editing suggestions.

g.text: Validates stream token and stores cookies
Registered publishers: wechat, x, zhihu, douyin.
Frontend also reserves bilibili and xiaohongshu entry points.
